properties.name: Afdera
properties.description: Last erupted 1907 (as of 2008). located at the intersection of three fault systems between the Erta Ale, Tat Ali, and Alayta mountain ranges.[

properties.name: Erta Ale
properties.description: Last erupted 2017 (as of 2018).  Recent lava surge in Dec2024-Jan2025 filled the crater and left 4 active vents as of 14Feb2025.  Confirmed with a hike inside the crater.
